wh_npcs.tip.npc_mover.3: §eRMB/LMB a block§7 — move the selected NPC.
wh_npcs.tip.trigger.1: §7Fires when a player enters the block.
wh_npcs.tip.trigger.2: §7Hidden; visible with this item or the Feather.
wh_npcs.msg.mover.select_first: §7Right-click an NPC first to select it.
wh_npcs.msg.feather.helper_unbound: §cHelper isn't linked to a trigger.§7 Place it right next to a trigger or a linked helper.
wh_npcs.msg.spawner.created: §aNPC created.§7 Open the editor with the §bMemorion's Feather §7(right-click the NPC).
wh_npcs.msg.respawn.pick_home: §eShift+RMB §7the feather on a block — "Home" respawn point
wh_npcs.msg.schedule.pick_point: §eShift+RMB §7the feather on a block — schedule point #%s §8(or reopen the schedule)
wh_npcs.msg.command.not_loaded: NPC "%s" isn't loaded. Teleport to it (/whc tp) and try again.
wh_npcs.msg.command.list_empty: No NPCs yet. Create one: /whc create <name>
wh_npcs.msg.command.skin_fetch_fail: Couldn't fetch skin "%s": %s. The NPC keeps the default one.
wh_npcs.msg.command.skin_default: NPC "%s" reset to the default skin.
wh_npcs.msg.command.faction_missing: Faction "%s" not found. List: /whc faction list
wh_npcs.msg.command.revive_ok: NPC "%s" brought back to life where it died.
wh_npcs.msg.command.revive_fail: No "%s" in the graveyard. Suggestions show who's there.
wh_npcs.msg.command.restock: Restock "%s": trade limits reset for all players.
wh_npcs.msg.command.dialogue_fail: Couldn't start "%s" — check the dialogue and node id (server log).
wh_npcs.msg.command.entry_add: Entry point "%s" added (no conditions, priority %s). Set conditions in the profile JSON or later in the editor.
wh_npcs.msg.command.import_entity_fail: Profile imported, but couldn't create the entity.
wh_npcs.msg.npc.restocked: Restocked: trade limits reset for all players.
wh_npcs.msg.dialogue.delete_denied: Only an admin (3+) can delete %s's dialogue.
wh_npcs.msg.dialogue.rename_taken: Id "%s" is already used by another dialogue.
wh_npcs.msg.profile.export_ok: §aProfile exported§7 to the world folder: wh_npcs/exports/%s.json
wh_npcs.msg.share.disabled: Import from PC is disabled by the server admin.
wh_npcs.msg.image.too_big: Image too large (max 4 MB, recommended 2–4 MB).
wh_npcs.msg.profile.delete_denied: Only an admin (level 3) or the singleplayer host can delete profile files.
wh_npcs.msg.skin.delete_file_denied: Only admins (level 3+) can delete skin files.
wh_npcs.msg.skin.delete_url_denied: Only an admin (3+) can delete %s's skin.
wh_npcs.msg.skin.url_deleted: URL skin removed from the library.
wh_npcs.msg.skin.url_fetch_err: Couldn't download the skin from the URL: %s
wh_npcs.msg.skin.url_exists: That URL is already in the library.
wh_npcs.msg.pose.delete_denied: Only an admin (level 3) or the singleplayer host can delete poses.
wh_npcs.ui.resist.title: Damage Resistance
wh_npcs.ui.resist.tip.recoil:
§eKnockback
§7Reduces knockback from hits and blasts.
§7100% — stands firm.
wh_npcs.ui.resist.tip.melee:
§eMelee
§7Direct close-range hits from mobs.
§7+ tougher, − weaker (×2 at −100).
wh_npcs.ui.resist.tip.projectile:
§eProjectiles
§7Arrows, tridents, charges and other throwables.
§7+ tougher, − weaker.
wh_npcs.ui.resist.tip.explosion:
§eExplosion
§7Creepers, TNT, blaze charges, etc.
§7+ tougher, − weaker.
wh_npcs.ui.resist.tip.magic:
§eMagic
§7Harming potions and other magic damage
§7(e.g. evoker fangs).
§7+ tougher, − weaker.
wh_npcs.ui.combat_preset.title: Combat Preset
wh_npcs.ui.combat_preset.shield_note: §8Needs a shield in hand. Blocks frontal damage.
wh_npcs.ui.combat_preset.tip.shield_hold: §eHow long the shield stays raised (0.3–5 s).
wh_npcs.ui.combat_preset.tip.shield_cool: §ePause between blocks (0.5–10 s) — a window to hit the NPC.
wh_npcs.ui.combat_preset.passive_note: §8A passive NPC won't fight — no targets needed.
wh_npcs.ui.combat_preset.tip.factions:
§eHostile factions
§7Attacks NPCs from factions hostile to
§7this NPC's faction (needs "Factions").
wh_npcs.ui.combat_preset.tip.spare_creep:
§eSpare creepers
§7The NPC won't attack creepers —
§7their blast won't wreck nearby builds.
wh_npcs.ui.combat_preset.arrows_note: §8Arrows go in the "Arrows" slot (Items tab). Empty — plain.
wh_npcs.ui.combat_preset.potions_note: §8Potions go on the Potion Belt tab.
wh_npcs.ui.creature_nature.title: Creature Quirks
wh_npcs.ui.creature_nature.tip.fall:
§eFall damage
§7Takes damage from falling.
§7Off — falls do no harm.
wh_npcs.ui.creature_nature.tip.web:
§eCobweb slowdown
§7Cobwebs slow it down (vanilla).
§7Off — passes through cobwebs freely.
wh_npcs.ui.creature_nature.tip.drown:
§eCan drown
§7Drowns underwater when air runs out.
§7Off — breathes underwater.
wh_npcs.ui.creature_nature.tip.poison:
§ePoison immunity
§7Never gets the Poison effect.
§8Undead are immune anyway.
wh_npcs.ui.creature_nature.tip.aggro_ran:
§eAggro range
§7How far the NPC can target an enemy.
§7Empty/0 — default (16).
§7Also affects chase distance.
wh_npcs.ui.behavior.title: Behavior
wh_npcs.ui.behavior.tip.look:
§eReact with gaze
§7Looks at nearby players and glances around.
§7Brings a standing NPC to life.
wh_npcs.ui.behavior.tip.wander:
§eWander idly
§7Roams nearby freely when off-schedule.
§7Radius — from spawn point, 0 = no bounds.
§7Off — stays put.
wh_npcs.ui.behavior.tip.panic:
§eFlee when hit
§7A non-fighting NPC panics and runs when hit.
§7For peaceful folk.
wh_npcs.ui.behavior.tip.avoid_sun:
§eFear sunlight
§7Hides in shade from daylight (undead).
§7Thematic — for vampires/undead.
wh_npcs.ui.behavior.tip.burn_sun:
§eBurn in sunlight
§7Catches fire under open daytime sky (undead).
§7A helmet protects; safe in shade/water/rain.
wh_npcs.ui.behavior.tip.pushable:
§ePushable
§7Players and other entities can shove the NPC around.
§7Off (default) — the NPC stays put, so its pose
§7and position aren't knocked out of place.
wh_npcs.ui.behavior.tip.passable:
§ePass through
§7Players can walk straight through the NPC, no collision.
§7Off (default) — the NPC is solid and blocks the way.
wh_npcs.ui.behavior.tip.totem:
§eTotem of Undying
§7Charges — how many times the NPC cheats
§7death (same effect as a totem). 0 — off.
§7"Totem in hand" shows a totem in the left
§7hand when the off-hand slot is empty.
§7Charges refresh on the "Heal" button and
§7on world reload.
wh_npcs.ui.behavior.tip.follow:
§eAuto-follow
§7The NPC follows a target from spawn.
§7Overrides schedule; if target is gone, returns to it.
§7One-off follow (dialogue) takes priority.
wh_npcs.ui.respawn.title: Respawn
wh_npcs.ui.respawn.tip.home:
§eHome point
§7Close the screen and Shift+RMB feather on a block —
§7the NPC respawns there.
wh_npcs.ui.disguise.title: Disguise
wh_npcs.ui.disguise.anim_note: Complex modded mob animations may not play.
wh_npcs.ui.disguise.pick_left: Pick a type on the left
wh_npcs.ui.namespace.title: Pick Source
wh_npcs.ui.curios.title: Accessories (Curios)
wh_npcs.ui.curios.slot.head: Head
wh_npcs.ui.second_char.title: Second Character
wh_npcs.ui.second_char.name: Name
wh_npcs.ui.portrait.title: NPC Portrait
wh_npcs.ui.schedule.title: Daily Schedule
wh_npcs.ui.node_music.title: Node Music
wh_npcs.ui.node_music.tip.loop:
§eLooping
§7On — the track repeats while the dialogue is open
§7or until "Stop music" fires.
§7Off — plays once and goes quiet.
wh_npcs.ui.pose_quick.note_pos: §8Drag the axes — the NPC shifts live in the world.
wh_npcs.ui.pose_quick.note_rot: §8Turn the axes — the NPC rotates live in the world.
wh_npcs.ui.glossary.title: Glossary
wh_npcs.ui.glossary.heading: Title
wh_npcs.ui.glossary.author:
§eAuthor
§7%s
wh_npcs.ui.glossary.intro1: §8Pick a term on the left or create one.
wh_npcs.ui.glossary.intro2: §8A term is a word and its explanation.
wh_npcs.ui.glossary.intro3: §8Then tag a word in a dialogue —
wh_npcs.ui.glossary.intro4: §8the player hovers and sees the hint.
wh_npcs.ui.import.title: Import Profile
wh_npcs.ui.node_images.title: Node Images
wh_npcs.ui.node_images.caption: Caption
wh_npcs.ui.node_images.empty_attachments: §8none yet — pick a file from the library below
wh_npcs.ui.node_images.sort_tooltip:
§eSort
§7A-Z / Z-A — by name,
§bNew §7— newest files on top.

§8Click — next mode.
wh_npcs.ui.node_images.folder_tooltip:
§eOpen folder in explorer
§7Drop a PNG — it appears in the list
§7after you reopen this window.
wh_npcs.ui.node_images.empty_favorites: §8No favorites — tag files with a heart
wh_npcs.ui.emotecraft.title: Emotes (Emotecraft)
wh_npcs.ui.emotecraft.empty_emotes: §8No emotes — add them to the emotes/ folder
wh_npcs.ui.spawner_edit.title: NPC Auto-Spawner
wh_npcs.ui.spawner_edit.tip_enabled:
§eToggle
§7Off — the spawner won't spawn NPCs,
§7but settings are kept. The figure freezes.
wh_npcs.ui.trigger_edit.title: Trigger Block
wh_npcs.ui.trigger_edit.desc: §8Fires when a player enters the block.
wh_npcs.ui.voice.title: NPC Voice
wh_npcs.ui.voice.pitch_tip:
§eVoice Pitch
§7From §b0.5 §7(deep) to §b2.0 §7(squeaky). Preview uses it.

§8Smith — 0.8, child — 1.5.
wh_npcs.ui.voice.set_tip:
§eSet (source)
§7Sound origin: §fVanilla§7 or a mod.
§8Click — searchable list.
wh_npcs.ui.voice.type_tip:
§eSound type
§7Grouped by id prefix:
§7ambient · block · entity · item
§7music · particle · ui · weather.
wh_npcs.ui.phrases.title: Lines
wh_npcs.ui.phrases.hint_ambient: Random lines when a player is near (radius/cooldown below).
wh_npcs.ui.phrases.hint_combat: When the NPC enters combat (acquires a target).
wh_npcs.ui.phrases.hint_interact: On right-click, if the NPC has no dialogue or trade.
wh_npcs.ui.phrases.hint_death: When the NPC dies (chat copy is more reliable than a bubble).
wh_npcs.ui.phrases.radius_tip:
§eRadius, blocks
§7If a player is closer, the NPC may say an idle line.
wh_npcs.ui.phrases.bubbles_tip:
§eSpeech bubbles for this NPC
§7Turn off if bubbles break the mood:
§7all lines and the "say" action go silent.
wh_npcs.ui.phrases.to_chat_tip:
§eCopy lines to chat
§7Each spoken line also goes to chat
§7for players within 24 blocks.
wh_npcs.ui.phrases.apply_note: Applies after "Save" in the NPC editor
wh_npcs.ui.rich_text.title: Text
wh_npcs.ui.monologue.title: Monologue
wh_npcs.ui.pose_edit.title: Pose by Body Part
wh_npcs.ui.pose_edit.freeze_tip:
§eFreeze Animation
§7Holds a static pose — no vanilla walk/idle.
§7Off — angles layer over the animation.
§8The head still tracks the player.
wh_npcs.ui.pose_edit.lying_hitbox_tip:
§eLying Hitbox
§7Flat damage/click box for lying poses
§7(so hits land on the body, not where it stands).
§8Affects collision: turn on for sleep poses.
wh_npcs.ui.pose_lib.title: Pose Library
wh_npcs.ui.pose_lib.empty: §8No poses — save the current one below
wh_npcs.ui.potion_belt.title: Potion Belt
wh_npcs.ui.potion_belt.tip_self:
§eFor Self — the NPC drinks
§7Drinks as needed for the potion effect:
§7• Healing/Regeneration — at HP < ~40%
§7• Fire Resistance — in fire/lava
§7• Water Breathing — underwater, out of air
§7• Speed/Strength — in combat
§8"In combat" — drink only when an enemy is near.
wh_npcs.ui.potion_belt.tip_enemy:
§eFor Enemies — the NPC throws
§7In combat throws these potions at the target (splash):
§7damage/poison/weakness hit the foe.
§8"In turn" — throw in order 1→2→3,
§8otherwise at random.
wh_npcs.ui.potion_belt.tip_ally:
§eFor Allies — the NPC throws
§7Out of combat, seeks a hurt ally (friendly NPC
§7or player at HP < 75%) and throws a potion at them.
§7Healing heals; poison poisons (your choice).
§8"In turn" — in order, otherwise at random.
wh_npcs.ui.potion_belt.buff_tip:
§6Combat Buff
§7What you place here, the NPC drinks AT THE START
§7of combat and gains that effect (any, even modded).
§8Triggers once when entering combat.
wh_npcs.ui.potion_belt.inventory: Inventory — click to grab a potion:
wh_npcs.ui.node_type.title: Node Type
wh_npcs.ui.node_type.text_desc1: Normal node: the NPC speaks, the player picks a reply.
wh_npcs.ui.node_type.text_desc2: §8The text and reply buttons are in the main dialogue window.
wh_npcs.ui.node_type.input_desc1: §8The player types a reply in the field (instead of choices).
wh_npcs.ui.node_type.input_desc2: §8Matches a choice's text → follow its branch,
wh_npcs.ui.node_type.input_desc4: §8"Hint" — gray example text in the empty field;
wh_npcs.ui.node_type.check_desc1: §8Auto-branch with no player choice: all conditions pass
wh_npcs.ui.node_type.check_desc2: §8and the chance hits → "Success" node, else → "Fail" node.
wh_npcs.ui.node_type.random_desc1: Random: jump to one of the nodes at random (higher
wh_npcs.ui.node_type.random_desc2: weight — more often). For varied NPC lines/reactions.
wh_npcs.ui.skin_lib.title: Skin Library
wh_npcs.ui.skin_lib.url.rename.tip:
§eRename
§7The name shows for everyone instead of the link.
wh_npcs.ui.skin_lib.url.rename.name: Name
wh_npcs.ui.skin_lib.files.path.tip:
§eOpen folder in file explorer
§7Drop in a 64×64 PNG — the skin shows up
§7next time you open the library.

§8name_slim.png — slim model.
wh_npcs.ui.skin_lib.files.upload.tip:
§eUpload a skin from your PC to the server
§7Pick a 64×64 PNG — it's saved on the server
§7and visible to all players.
§8Filename with _slim — slim model.
wh_npcs.ui.offers.title: Trade
wh_npcs.ui.offers.limit.tip:
§eDeals per restock
§7Per §feach player§7 separately.
§b0 §7— no limit.
wh_npcs.ui.offers.xp.tip:
§eXP per deal
§7Orbs from the NPC, like villagers. §b0 §7— no XP.
wh_npcs.ui.offers.restock.tip:
§eRestock, minutes (shared per NPC)
§7How long §fafter the first purchase§7
§7until a player's deal limits reset.
§b0 §7— never.

§8By hand: /whc restock <name>.
wh_npcs.ui.offers.invalid.tip:
§cOffer won't be saved
§7Needs at least §bprice A §7and a §bgood§7.
wh_npcs.ui.offers.has_settings.tip:
§eThis offer has settings
§7Limit, XP or conditions — see panel below.
wh_npcs.ui.offers.limit.mode.tip:
§eWhose limit
§bper player §7— each gets their own quota;
§beveryone §7— shared server-wide: "exclusive,
§7%s total — first come, first served".
wh_npcs.ui.offers.cond.tip:
§eOffer conditions
§7The offer shows only when met:
§7reputation, flags, items, etc.

§8Example: "for allies" — reputation 20+.
wh_npcs.ui.offers.restock_now.tip:
§eRestock now
§7Reset this NPC's deal limits
§7for §fall§7 players (and shared quotas).
wh_npcs.ui.offers.hint.count: §8Item count: mouse wheel over a slot (Shift — by 8).
wh_npcs.ui.offers.hint.slot: §8Right-click a slot — clear item. Click a row — pick offer.
wh_npcs.ui.offers.confirm_restock.title: Restock now?
wh_npcs.ui.offers.confirm_restock.body: §7Deal limits will reset for all players.
wh_npcs.ui.dialogue_edit.title: Dialogue Editor
wh_npcs.ui.dialogue_edit.target_tip:
Choice's target node.
Empty — close the dialogue.
wh_npcs.ui.dialogue_edit.issue_choice_ba: §c✖ §7Node §f%s§7: choice #%s points to a missing node §c%s
wh_npcs.ui.dialogue_edit.issue_no_choice: §e⚠ §7Node §f%s§7: no choices — player can only leave with ESC
wh_npcs.ui.dialogue_edit.id_copied: id "%s" copied — paste into target field (Ctrl+V)
wh_npcs.ui.dialogue_edit.tip_delete_star:
§eDelete node
§7The start node can't be deleted.
§8Make another node the start first.
wh_npcs.ui.dialogue_edit.tip_photo:
§eNode images
§7Up to 3 attachments — §blinks §7in the dialogue,
§7click opens a view card.

§8PNGs live in saves/<world>/wh_npcs/images/
wh_npcs.ui.dialogue_edit.tip_music:
§eNode music (disc)
§7Drop a disc — it plays while the dialogue
§7is open and carries on across nodes.

§8Stop early — the "Stop music" action.
wh_npcs.ui.dialogue_edit.tip_second_char:
§eSecond character (2C)
§7A second NPC model on the right of the dialogue
§7on this node. Taken from a saved preset
§7(NPC export). Can be changed/removed per node.
wh_npcs.ui.dialogue_edit.tip_glossary:
§eGlossary (terms)
§7Make a word + note, then tag a word
§7in the text with it — the player hovers in
§7the dialogue and reads the hint.
wh_npcs.ui.dialogue_edit.tip_page_mode:
§ePage mode
§bAll §7— the player flips through in order.
§bRandom §7— one random page is shown.

§8Example: six greeting variants.
wh_npcs.ui.dialogue_edit.tip_node_type:
§eNode type
§7Text · Input · Check · Random.
§7Click — pick a type and set up a special node.
wh_npcs.ui.dialogue_edit.tip_conditions:
§eChoice conditions%s
§7When the choice is shown and active,
§7and a §block hint §7when unmet.

§8Example: "bring 3 diamonds".
wh_npcs.ui.dialogue_edit.tip_actions:
§eChoice actions%s
§7Run when the choice is clicked:
§7items, flag, reputation, command,
§7sound, titles.

§8Example: reward + flag "quest done".
wh_npcs.ui.dialogue.tip_stay:
§eStay here
§7The NPC stops following (like Shift+right-click by hand).
wh_npcs.ui.dialogue.tip_goodbye:
§eSay goodbye
§7The NPC leaves and returns to its original spot.
wh_npcs.ui.dialogue.music_muted: §8Muted for you — click the icon to unmute.
wh_npcs.ui.dialogue.music_click_mute: §8Click the icon on the right — mute for yourself.
wh_npcs.ui.dialogue.input_hint: §8Type an answer and press OK (or Enter).
wh_npcs.ui.dialogue.rep_bar: §8The bar — progress to the next tier.
wh_npcs.ui.test_dialogue.title: Dialogue Test
wh_npcs.ui.test_dialogue.closed_note: §7Dialogue closed §8— "⟲ Restart" to run it again
wh_npcs.ui.conditions.title: Conditions
wh_npcs.ui.conditions.hint_tip:
§eHint (lock)
§7Empty — choice fully hidden.
§7Text — locked with this hint in the tooltip.
wh_npcs.ui.conditions.apply_note: Applied after "Save" in the dialogue editor
wh_npcs.ui.conditions.empty_hint: Add a condition on the left ("+ condition")
wh_npcs.ui.conditions.faction_tip_empty:
§8factions.json is empty — add a faction
§8and run /whc faction reload.
wh_npcs.ui.conditions.items_header: Player has (grab item → click slot, RMB — clear):
wh_npcs.ui.conditions.inv_take: Inventory — click to grab item to cursor:
wh_npcs.ui.cond.type.items.label: Items
wh_npcs.ui.cond.type.items.detail:
§eItems
§7Checks the player's inventory, up to 4 slots.
§7Count is summed §facross§7 the inventory.

§bIgnore NBT §8— §7any such item
§bExact NBT §8— §7same NBT exactly (name, enchants)
§bTag §8— §7any item from an item tag

§6"Consume" §7— items are taken on click.
§8Classic: "bring 3 diamonds" with consume.
wh_npcs.ui.cond.type.flag.label: Flag
wh_npcs.ui.cond.type.flag.detail:
§eFlag
§7A personal player marker. Set by the action
§bset_flag §7in dialogue or command §b/whc flags§7.

§8Example: a "we've met" branch shows only
§8if the first talk set the flag met_npc.
wh_npcs.ui.cond.type.held_item.label: Held Item
wh_npcs.ui.cond.type.held_item.desc: Player holds an item in main hand
wh_npcs.ui.cond.type.held_item.detail:
§eHeld Item
§7The item must be §fin the main hand§7,
§7not just sitting in the inventory.

§8Example: "show the guard token" — the player
§8takes the token into hand.
wh_npcs.ui.cond.type.permission.label: Permission
wh_npcs.ui.cond.type.permission.detail:
§ePermission
§7The player's operator (op) level.
§b2 §7— standard admin rights.

§8For admin and debug branches that
§8regular players should not see.
wh_npcs.ui.cond.type.random.label: Chance
wh_npcs.ui.cond.type.random.detail:
§eChance
§7Triggers at random with the given probability.
§7Rolled §feach time the node shows§7.

§8Example: a rare easter-egg line at 5%.
wh_npcs.ui.cond.type.reputation.label: Reputation
wh_npcs.ui.cond.type.reputation.detail:
§eReputation
§7The player's reputation with a §bfaction§7.
§7Bounds §b"from/to" §7are inclusive;
§7an empty bound is not checked.

§7Changed by action §breputation §7or §b/whc rep§7.

§8Example: a "for friends" branch — from 20.
wh_npcs.ui.cond.type.score.label: Score
wh_npcs.ui.cond.type.score.detail:
§eScore
§7Compares a scoreboard objective value.
§7Bounds §b"from/to" §7are inclusive;
§7an empty bound is not checked.

§8For tie-ins with datapacks and maps.
wh_npcs.ui.cond.type.player.label: Player
wh_npcs.ui.cond.type.player.detail:
§ePlayer
§7The choice shows only to players in the name list
§7(case-insensitive, comma-separated).

§8Example: a personal branch for Dev and Alex —
§8easter eggs, admin talks, personal quests.
wh_npcs.ui.cond.type.var_equals.label: Variable
wh_npcs.ui.cond.type.var_equals.detail:
§eVariable
§7Remembers text the player typed in an §bInput§7
§7node and compares it to a value.

§71.§7 §bInput§7 node: set "store into variable",
§7   e.g. §bpassword§7.
§72.§7 Here: §bName§7 = same §bpassword§7, §bValue§7 = what you expect.
§73.§7 Toggle: exact / ignore case.

§8Names must match. Empty = not entered yet.
§8Show in text: {var:password}
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.give_item.label: Give Items
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.give_item.detail:
§eGive Items
§7Puts items into the player's inventory;
§7what won't fit drops at their feet.

§7NBT (name, enchants) is §bcopied§7 from the item
§7you click in your inventory.

§8Quest reward: "here's your sword."
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.take_item.label: Take Items
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.take_item.desc: Items are taken from the player (up to 3 slots)
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.take_item.detail:
§eTake Items
§7Removes items §fatomically§7: either all
§7on the list, or nothing.

§7Often the Items condition with §6"Consume"§7
§7is handier — it also checks you have them.

§8Example: pay for a service without a branch.
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.set_flag.label: Flag
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.set_flag.detail:
§eFlag
§7A per-player marker.
§7Checked by the Flag condition in any
§7dialogue or entry point.

§8Classic: met_npc after a first meeting.
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.reputation.label: Reputation
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.reputation.desc: Change reputation with a faction by ±N
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.reputation.detail:
§eReputation
§7Changes the player's reputation with a §bfaction§7
§7and shows an actionbar message.

§7Factions live in §bfactions.json§7;
§7reload with §b/whc faction reload§7.

§8"Helped the smith" → +5 to the guild.
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.say.label: Line (bubble)
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.say.desc: A line in a bubble above the NPC's head
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.say.detail:
§eLine
§7A speech bubble overhead — seen by §feveryone§7
§7nearby, not just the talker.
§7Placeholders: §b{player}§7, §b{npc}§7.

§8"Come back soon, {player}!" after a deal.
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.emote.label: Emote (icon)
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.emote.desc: An icon above the NPC's head (! ? heart...)
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.emote.detail:
§eEmote
§7An icon overhead — seen by §feveryone§7 nearby,
§7holds for a couple of seconds.

§7Set: §b! ? heart anger sweat note …§7

§8"!" on meeting, "heart" after a gift.
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.emotecraft_emote.des: The NPC plays an animated emote
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.emotecraft_emote.det:
§eEmote (Emotecraft)
§7The NPC plays an §fanimation§7 from the
§7Emotecraft add-on — seen by §feveryone§7 nearby.

§7Needs §bEmotecraft§7 (and Player Animator) installed;
§7players without it silently skip the action.

§8"Wave" on meeting, "bow" at the end.
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.stop_emotecraft_emot:
§eStop Emote (Emotecraft)
§7Interrupts the NPC's playing emote animation.
§7Handy for §flooping§7 emotes (a dance).

§8"— Stop dancing." at the right moment.
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.open_trade.label: Trade
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.open_trade.detail:
§eTrade
§7Opens the §fvanilla§7 trade screen
§7with offers from the NPC profile.

§7No wares — the player sees
§7"Nothing to trade yet."

§8Classic: a "— Show me your wares" choice.
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.run_command.label: Command
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.run_command.desc: Run a command from the server
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.run_command.detail:
§eCommand
§7Runs §ffrom the server§7 (perm 2) at the player's
§7position; §b@s §7— the talking player.
§7Placeholders: §b{player}§7, §b{npc}§7.

§6Blocked: §7op, deop, stop, whitelist,
§7ban, pardon and their variants.

§8Example: tp {player} 100 64 200.
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.sound.label: Sound
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.sound.desc: Play a sound for the player
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.sound.detail:
§eSound
§7Plays in the world at the player.
§7Volume §b0.1–2.0§7, pitch §b0.5–2.0§7.

§8Example: entity.villager.celebrate
§8when a deal is done.
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.title.label: Title
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.title.detail:
§eTitle
§7A large heading centered on screen,
§7a subtitle and/or a line above the hotbar.
§7Empty fields are not shown.
§7Placeholders: §b{player}§7, §b{npc}§7.

§8"The Smith's Secret" / "Chest under the fir..."
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.monologue.label: Monologue (cutscene)
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.monologue.detail:
§eMonologue (cutscene)
§7An HSR-style bar at the bottom: portrait,
§7name and typewriter text.
§7A line = a page; click/space goes on.
§7Portrait — a name for the face (§b{player}§7 ok).

§8"...and then the sky went dark."
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.stop_music.label: Stop Music
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.stop_music.detail:
§eStop Music
§7Fades out the disc set on the node
§7(it plays while the dialogue runs).

§8"— Enough music." at the right moment.
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.follow.label: Follow Player
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.follow.desc: The NPC walks after the talker (escort)
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.follow.detail:
§eFollow Player
§7The NPC starts walking after the talker.
§7Falls behind — catches up (teleport set
§7on the Combat tab). Combat wins: after a fight it resumes.

§8"— Come with me." Stop — Shift+RMB by hand
§8or the "Stop Following" action.
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.stop_follow.label: Stop Following
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.stop_follow.detail:
§eStop Following
§7The NPC stops walking after the player
§7and stays where it is.

§8"— Wait for me here."
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.follow_wait.label: Wait Here (pause)
wh_npcs.ui.act.type.follow_wait.detail:
§eWait Here (pause)
§7The NPC stops but stays §fyours§7 — resumes
§7on a "Follow Player" action.

§8Unlike "Stop" — the bond is kept.
wh_npcs.ui.actions.apply_note: Applied after "Save" in the dialogue editor
wh_npcs.ui.actions.empty_hint: §8Add an action on the left — "+ action"
wh_npcs.ui.actions.faction_tip_empty:
§8factions.json is empty — add a faction
§8and run /whc faction reload.
wh_npcs.ui.actions.say_caption: A line in a bubble above the NPC's head:
wh_npcs.ui.actions.say_note1: §8Seen by all nearby. For random idle lines —
wh_npcs.ui.actions.emote_caption: Icon above the head (click to pick):
wh_npcs.ui.actions.stop_emote_line2: Emotecraft emote animation on the NPC.
wh_npcs.ui.actions.trade_line1: No settings: opens the vanilla trade
wh_npcs.ui.actions.trade_line2: screen with offers from the NPC profile.
wh_npcs.ui.actions.trade_note2: §8on the "Profile" tab of the NPC editor.
wh_npcs.ui.actions.stop_music_line1: No settings: gently fades out the disc
wh_npcs.ui.actions.stop_music_note1: §8The disc is set on the node — "Music" button
wh_npcs.ui.actions.follow_line1: No settings: the NPC walks after the talker.
wh_npcs.ui.actions.stop_follow_line1: No settings: the NPC stops in place
wh_npcs.ui.actions.stop_follow_line2: and stops walking after the player.
wh_npcs.ui.actions.follow_wait_line2: but stays bound to the player.
wh_npcs.ui.actions.give_caption: Player gets (click — pick slot, RMB — clear):
wh_npcs.ui.actions.take_caption: Taken from the player (atomic: all or nothing):
wh_npcs.ui.actions.nbt_tip:
§eNBT copied from the item
§7Name, enchants and the rest are kept.
wh_npcs.ui.actions.inv_caption: Inventory — click puts a ghost in the active slot:
wh_npcs.ui.npc.title: NPC Editor
wh_npcs.ui.npc.preset_desc_melee:
Melee combat. Pick targets
with the checkboxes below.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.preset_desc_shield:
Melee with a shield: raises it and
blocks frontal damage, just like a player.
Give it a shield (off-hand is best).
wh_npcs.ui.npc.preset_desc_bow:
Shoots if holding a bow/crossbow
(else melee). Ammo goes in
the "Arrows" slot.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.preset_desc_potion:
Throws splash potions from the
"Potion Belt" and heals allies.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.tip_health:
§eHealth
§7An unarmored player hits for 1.
§820 — like a player, 100 — mini-boss.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.tip_damage:
§eDamage
§7Base, unarmed. Enchantments on
§7functional gear are added on top.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.tip_armor:
§eArmor
§7Defense points §b0–30§7 on top of worn armor.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.tip_regen:
§eRegen HP/sec
§7Heals the NPC once a second (HP, not hearts).
§b1 §7— +1 HP/s (half a heart), §b0.5 §7— slow, §b0 §7— off.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.tip_xp:
§eXP on Kill
§7Random number from the range.
§b0–0 §7— no XP.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.bh_run_tip:
§eCan run
§7Sprints to catch up when far behind
§7(past half the zone). Off — always walks.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.bh_tp_tip:
§eTeleport to catch up
§7Got far away (past wall/cliff) — teleports
§7to a nearby block. Off — walks only, may lag behind.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.bh_tp_oos_tip:
§eTeleport off-screen
§7Teleports only when you're NOT looking —
§7no blinking in front of you, appears behind.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.bh_match_speed_tip:
§eMatch your speed
§7Walks when you walk, runs when you run.
§7Off — fixed speed.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.bh_doors_tip:
§eOpen doors
§7Opens and closes doors on the way, like a villager.
§7Off — leaves doors alone (may get stuck).
wh_npcs.ui.npc.bh_avoid_tip:
§eAvoid danger
§7Routes around lava, fire, cactus and cliffs.
§7Off — walks straight through (may die).
wh_npcs.ui.npc.bh_tp_fx_tip:
§eTeleport effect
§7Particles and a quiet sound when appearing after a teleport.
§7Pure cosmetic. Off — silent teleport.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.bh_spacing_tip:
§eNo crowding
§7Several NPCs following you keep their spacing,
§7don't clump up. Off — all head to one point.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.bh_schedule_tip:
§eDaily Schedule
§7The NPC walks between points by time of day
§7and takes poses (stand/wander/sleep/work).
wh_npcs.ui.npc.bh_traits_tip:
§eTraits (idle behavior)
§7Gaze, wandering, panic on hit, sun fear
§7and constant auto-follow of a target.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.bh_reactions_tip:
§eEvent Reactions
§7Actions on: taking damage, death,
§7interaction (no dialogue) and player approach.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.bh_flags_tip:
§ePlayer Flags
§7Inspect flags on players: who set them
§7and when, plus your own description hints.
wh_npcs.ui.flags.title: Player Flags
wh_npcs.ui.flags.pick_player: Pick a player on the left
wh_npcs.ui.flags.sort_tip: Sort: name A-Z / Z-A / by flag count
wh_npcs.ui.npc.attackable_tip:
§eAttackable
§7Off — the NPC §fcannot§7 be killed (except /kill).
§7On — attributes and the "Death" block apply.

§8Safety net: the fallen go to the "graveyard",
§8/whc revive brings anyone back.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.combat_style_tip:
§eCombat style and targets
§7Click — pick a style (melee/bow/
§7potions) and who to attack.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.potion_belt_tip:
§ePotion Belt
§7Potions the NPC drinks as needed
§7(fire/HP/water/combat) and throws in battle.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.death_tip:
§eDeath behavior
§bRespawn §7— comes back on its own, with gear
§7(place/time/cost — "Respawn" button);
§bVanish §7— only /whc revive brings it back.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.respawn_tip:
§eRespawn
§7Delay, place (death/home/owner),
§7limit and cost — on a separate screen.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.combat_type_tip:
§eCreature Type
§7Combat like vanilla mobs of this type.
§7Bonus damage from enchantments:
§7• §bSmite§7 — vs undead
§7• §bBane of Arthropods§7 — vs spiders, etc.
§7• §bImpaling§7 — vs aquatic
§8Undead: healing potion hurts, immune
§8to poison and regeneration.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.combat_leap_tip:
§eLeap at Target
§7Lunges at the enemy in bursts, like a wolf.
§7Melee only (not bow/potions).
wh_npcs.ui.npc.resistances_tip:
§eDamage Resistance
§7Knockback, melee, projectiles, explosion,
§7fire, fall, magic — via sliders.
§7Can go negative (vulnerability).
wh_npcs.ui.npc.nature_tip:
§eCreature Quirks
§7Fall damage, webs, drowning,
§7poison immunity, aggro range.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.combat_hpbar_tip:
§eHP Bar (boss-style)
§7HP bar at the top of the screen for nearby players
§7while the NPC is in combat. Color and radius adjustable.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.drop_chance_tip:
§eDrop chance
§7Wheel: §b±5§7, with Shift — §b±1§7.
§7Click — type a number.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.fac_penalty_tip:
§eKill penalty for the faction's NPC
§7Subtracts this much reputation from the killer.
§b0 §7— off.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.fac_price_tip:
§eTrade price multiplier
§b1.0 §7— normal prices, §b0.75 §7— 25% off,
§b1.5 §7— markup, §b0 §7— won't trade with this tier.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.title_eye_on: §7Currently §6shown§7 as a second line on the NPC name tag.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.title_eye_off:
§7Currently §8hidden§7. Click — shows as a second line
§7on the NPC name tag, smaller than the name.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.title_eye_tip_color: §8Select text in the title field — a color picker pops up. No color — gray.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.faction_tip:
§eFaction
§7The side this NPC belongs to. Your reputation
§7with it shapes how they treat you in dialogue
§7and the prices they offer.

§8Click to pick another faction.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.trade_tip:
§eNPC Trade
§7Offers "price → item": limits per restock,
§7XP, visibility conditions, restock time.

§8Opens via the open_trade action from dialogue
§8or directly on RMB if the NPC has no dialogues.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.lines_tip:
§eLines (speech bubbles)
§7Random phrases in a bubble above the head
§7when a player is near. Radius, cooldown and
§7toggle are inside.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.name_format_note: §8Select the name — a formatting toolbar appears.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.export_tip:
§eExport profile
§7Save this NPC's settings to a file
§7in the world folder: §8saves/<world>/wh_npcs/exports/
§7— for sharing and backup.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.export_server_tip:
§eExport to server
§7Save the profile to the server folder
§8(world)/wh_npcs/exports/ — shared.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.export_client_tip:
§eExport to your PC
§7Save the profile to a local folder
§8.minecraft/wh_npcs/local_profiles/ and open it.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.import_tip:
§eImport profile
§7Replace this NPC's settings from a file.
§8The current ones will be overwritten.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.theme_tip:
§eInterface Theme
§7Dark (custom) ↔ vanilla (MineCraft buttons).
§8Saved locally for you.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.rep_empty: §8No players online and no saved values
wh_npcs.ui.npc.items_unavailable: Items unavailable: NPC out of view.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.items_unavailable_hint: §8Open the editor with Memorion's Feather (RMB the NPC).
wh_npcs.ui.npc.equip_func_tip:
§eFunctional set
§7The NPC's real items: §barmor and enchantments
§7work in combat.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.equip_cosm_tip:
§eCosmetic set
§7Looks only: a filled slot §6overrides§7
§7the functional one in render, no combat effect.

§8Example: NPC fights with a diamond sword,
§8but holds a rusty modded blade on screen.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.equip_arrows_tip:
§eArrow slot
§7Ammo for the "Archer" preset: arrows (any,
§7incl. enchanted/spectral) or a snowball.
§7Empty — shoots plain arrows for free.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.inventory_take: Inventory — click to take an item:
wh_npcs.ui.npc.vis_armor_tip:
§eArmor render
§7Hides §fall§7 armor (both sets) visually.
§7Functional set's defense §6still works§7.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.vis_mainhand_tip:
§eMain hand render
§7Hides the item in the main hand visually.
§7Weapon damage/function §6still work§7.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.vis_offhand_tip:
§eOff hand render
§7Hides the item in the off hand visually.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.equip_rmb_note: §8RMB with an item — copy into slot, without — clear.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.accessories_tip:
§eAccessories (Curios)
§7Rings, amulets, etc.: their effects and
§7attributes work on the NPC.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.dlg_rename_tip:
§eRename dialogue§r
§7Changes the id of the §fselected§7 dialogue and
§7fixes every reference: NPC entry points and
§7player progress. Type the new id in the field
§7below and press "Rename".
§8Select a dialogue in the list first.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.fac_create_tip:
§eNew faction
§7Type a name — the id is made for you
§7(translit: "White Knights" → §bwhite_knights§7).
wh_npcs.ui.npc.fac_intro1: §8Pick a faction on the left or create a new one.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.fac_color_tip:
§eFaction color
§7Relation bar in dialogue and lists.
§7Click — palette.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.fac_players_tip:
§ePlayer reputation
§7View and adjust values
§7for this faction (online + anyone who has it).
wh_npcs.ui.npc.fac_enmity_tip:
§eHostile factions
§7Guards/Aggressors/Archers of this faction
§7attack NPCs of the chosen factions (one-way).
§7Click — list with checkboxes.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.tier_bottom_tip:
§eBottom tier
§7Catches all reputation below the next tier's
§7threshold — needs no threshold of its own.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.confirm_fac_used: §6Used by %s NPC — they'll lose the indicator.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.dlg_refresh_tip:
§eRefresh list§r
§7Re-reads dialogue files added on the server.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.dlg_import_tip:
§eImport dialogue from PC§r
§7Pick a dialogue JSON file on your computer.
§7Loads onto the server instantly, no restart.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.dlg_export_tip:
§eExport dialogue to PC§r
§7Saves the §fselected§7 dialogue to .minecraft/
§7wh_npcs/local_dialogues and opens the folder.
§8Select a dialogue in the list first.
wh_npcs.msg.dialogue.export_select: §7Select a dialogue in the list first.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.dlg_mine_tip:
§eMy dialogues only§r
§7Show dialogues authored by you.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.portrait_tip:
§eNPC Portrait
§7A 9:16 photo in the dialogue window instead of the 3D model.
§7Files — from the server's image library.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.dlg_empty_fav: §8No favorites — mark dialogues with the heart
wh_npcs.ui.npc.dlg_delete_tip:
§eDelete from server
§7Own dialogues — anyone with editor rights,
§7others' — admin (3+).
wh_npcs.ui.npc.entry_header: Checked top to bottom; the first match opens a dialogue.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.entry_empty: No entry points — without them RMB on the NPC opens nothing.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.entry_indicator_tip:
§eIndicator above the NPC
§7Appears to the player when this entry point
§7becomes the first match.
§b! §7— new talk, §b? §7— continuation.
§8Click — toggle (none → ! → ?).
wh_npcs.ui.npc.entry_indicators_tip:
§eIndicators above this NPC
§7Master switch: off — no !/? are shown,
§7even if entry points define them.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.confirm_dlg_used: §6Used by NPCs — their entry points will break:
wh_npcs.ui.npc.confirm_npc_siblings_one: §7%s more NPC with the same settings will remain — unaffected.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.confirm_npc_siblings_many: §7%s more NPCs with the same settings will remain — unaffected.
wh_npcs.ui.emote_icon.question: Question "?"
wh_npcs.ui.reactions.title: Reactions
wh_npcs.ui.reactions.range_tip:
§eApproach radius
§71–16 blocks for the "Player approach" reaction.
§7Empty/0 — reaction disabled.
wh_npcs.ui.reactions.ev.hurt.label: On hurt
wh_npcs.ui.reactions.ev.death.label: On death
wh_npcs.ui.reactions.ev.interact.label: Interact
wh_npcs.ui.reactions.ev.interact.desc: §7On RMB, if the NPC has no dialogue/trade.
wh_npcs.ui.reactions.ev.approach.label: Player approach
wh_npcs.ui.npc.voice_tip:
§eVoice
§7A sound the NPC makes in dialogue and lines
§7(like a villager's mumble).
§8Pick a sound and pitch.
wh_npcs.ui.npc.disguise_tip:
§eDisguise
§7Makes the NPC look like another mob
§7(zombie, villager, etc.) while staying an NPC.
§8Changes looks only, not behavior.
